title: Paying Off Debt Can Drop Your Score 40 Points
hook: You just paid off a loan and your credit score dropped — that's not a glitch, it's the algorithm punishing you for doing the right thing.
angle: Credit scoring algorithms reward active debt: closing accounts erases 15% account-age credit and 10% credit-mix credit overnight.
audience: Anyone paying off debt while trying to improve credit for a mortgage, car loan, or refinance
